title: goeppertia ovata
intro: Goeppertia ovata, also known as the Calathea ovata or the Peacock Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goeppertia ovata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Goeppertia ovata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
